shortDescription: Production-oriented Rocket League cast overlays and BO controls.
longDescription: Cast Package combines a live scoreboard, goal and victory animations, player boost and live stat widgets, team preview panels, cage shot maps, end-of-match statistics widgets, a unified fullscreen stats event visual for cage stats, head-to-head and team statistics, and a BO/regie control page. It is intended for stream operators who want a cohesive first-party overlay pack with host-mediated controls and service-backed series state.
